text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 Commander-in-Chief of the Iranian Army Hatami rejected U.S. claims that the Iranian Air Force is destroyed, reporting that Iranian fighter jets escorted the Pakistani delegation arriving in Tehran yesterday through Iranian airspace. “They say, we took away your air force. Yesterday, we had a guest. He was entering the country’s airspace. They said, we want our aircraft to come and escort. We said, no need. With two times the number of aircraft they wanted to escort, we escorted. We brought our guest and carried out the mission.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 伊朗军队总司令哈塔米驳斥了美国关于伊朗空军已被摧毁的说法，并报告称，伊朗战斗机昨日为抵达德黑兰的巴基斯坦代表团护航，穿越了伊朗领空。“他们说，我们摧毁了你们的空军。昨天，我们有一位客人。他进入了该国领空。他们说，我们希望我们的飞机来护航。我们说，不需要。我们派出的护航飞机数量是他们要求的两倍。我们接到了我们的客人并完成了任务。” @wfwitness

text: WarTranslated The Tuapse oil refinery in Russia continues to burn, with a column of smoke captured by surveillance cameras as far as 78 km away - from the "Zhemchuzhina" hotel in Sochi. Recent satellite imagery shows a massive blaze on the plant's grounds. In addition to the refinery itself, one of the fires was recorded right in the sea near the coast. This facility is a strategic hub for Rosneft, operating as a unified complex with the maritime terminal. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 俄罗斯图阿普谢炼油厂持续燃烧，远在78公里外的索契“珍珠”酒店的监控摄像头拍到了烟柱。最新的卫星图像显示工厂区域内火势巨大。除了炼油厂本身，海岸附近的海面上也记录到了火情。该设施是俄罗斯石油公司的战略枢纽，与海上码头作为一个统一的综合体运营。推文

text: Türkiye, Syria and Jordan agreed to modernize their railways to create a corridor linking Southern Europe to the Persian Gulf. The project is expected to take 4–5 years and will later connect to Saudi Arabia’s rail network. Source: Bloomberg
text_zh: 土耳其、叙利亚和约旦同意对其铁路进行现代化改造，以建立一条连接南欧与波斯湾的走廊。该项目预计耗时4-5年，未来将与沙特阿拉伯的铁路网相连。来源：彭博社

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 ISNA: An Iranian parliamentary official reports that Iran is focusing on strengthening the national currency, the rial by strengthening control over the Strait of Hormuz, with current revenue estimates at between $10 billion and $15 billion annually. Under the proposal, foreign vessels could be required to settle payments through offices in Iran or via Iranian-linked banking systems in the region, a move intended to bolster demand for the rial. The official said the plan aims to give Iran a regulatory role in the strategic waterway, stressing that the intention is not to disrupt shipping or engage in extortion. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 ISNA：一位伊朗议会官员报告称，伊朗正致力于通过加强对霍尔木兹海峡的控制来巩固本国货币里亚尔，目前估计年收入在100亿至150亿美元之间。根据该提案，外国船只可能被要求通过伊朗境内的办事处或该地区与伊朗有关联的银行系统进行结算，此举旨在提振对里亚尔的需求。该官员表示，该计划旨在让伊朗在这一战略水道中发挥监管作用，并强调其目的并非干扰航运或进行勒索。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇫🇷 🇬🇧 🇮🇹 Süddeutsche Zeitung : Germany is prepared to participate in an international mission to secure the Strait of Hormuz, focusing on mine‑clearing and maritime reconnaissance. German Chancellor Friedrich Merz will present the offer at a meeting in Paris with French President Macron and British Prime Minister Starmer, also attended by Italy’s Meloni. The Bundeswehr would contribute ten specialised mine‑hunting vessels (Type MJ332) and use its logistics base in Djibouti for reconnaissance. German participation requires a prior end to hostilities, an international mission, a UN mandate (preferably) and Bundestag approval. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇫🇷 🇬🇧 🇮🇹 《南德意志报》：德国准备参与一项旨在确保霍尔木兹海峡安全的国际任务，重点是扫雷和海上侦察。德国总理弗里德里希·默茨（Friedrich Merz）将在巴黎与法国总统马克龙、英国首相斯塔默以及意大利总理梅洛尼举行的会议上提出这一提议。德国联邦国防军将提供十艘专业扫雷舰（MJ332型），并利用其在吉布提的后勤基地进行侦察。德国的参与需要以敌对行动结束、国际任务、联合国授权（最好）以及联邦议院批准为前提。@wfwitness

text: 🇪🇺 🏁 "Today with NATO Secretary General we took stock of our common work to bolster European defence and continue support to Ukraine. We discussed the upcoming NATO Summit and how we can upscale defence industrial output in Europe. We need to invest more, to produce more and to do both faster. With the rise in global security threats, we agreed to work closely together in the next weeks to strengthen the EU-NATO relationship and prepare a successful Summit in Ankara." - Die Leyenführerin 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇪🇺 🏁 “今天，我与北约秘书长共同评估了我们在加强欧洲防御和继续支持乌克兰方面的共同工作。我们讨论了即将举行的北约峰会，以及我们如何提高欧洲的国防工业产出。我们需要投入更多，生产更多，并且更快地完成这两项工作。随着全球安全威胁的增加，我们同意在未来几周内密切合作，加强欧盟与北约的关系，并为在安卡拉举行的成功峰会做好准备。” - 冯德莱恩 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“基里亚特什莫纳一辆空车遭1次撞击。暂无人员伤亡报告。@wfwitness”受损汽车的更多画面。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Kiryat Shmona, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness" 1 impact on an empty car in Kiryat Shmona. No injuries were reported. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 以色列北部基里亚特什莫纳及对抗线周边地区响起红色警报。@wfwitness”基里亚特什莫纳一辆空车遭1次撞击。暂无人员伤亡报告。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 An Israeli airstrike targets Deir Qanoun al-Nahr, southern Lebanon @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Another footage from an Israeli airstrike in hay targeted Deir Qanoun al-Nahr, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 以色列空袭黎巴嫩南部代尔卡农纳赫尔 @wfwitness”⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列空袭黎巴嫩南部代尔卡农纳赫尔的另一段画面。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 An Israeli airstrike targets Deir Qanoun al-Nahr, southern Lebanon @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列空袭黎巴嫩南部代尔卡农纳赫尔 @wfwitness

text: Iran has moved about 9 million barrels of crude from floating storage in the Gulf of Oman since the U.S. naval blockade began on April 13. Source
text_zh: 自4月13日美国海军封锁开始以来，伊朗已从阿曼湾的浮动储油设施中运走了约900万桶原油。来源

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @Etienne_Marcuz : FINALLY ! A French Rafale seen taking off from Istres air base with a rocket pod under its wing, most probably in order to test a low cost solution for drone hunting mission. 📸 via @Bruno_Aviation https://twitter.com/Etienne_Marcuz/status/2044760629114802425/photo/1 Un Rafale équipé de roquettes guidées laser aperçu à Istres. Les essais ont donc enfin démarré. Ici une nacelle Thalès JF12, donc 24 roquettes 68mm au total. Une corde de plus à l'arc du Rafale, la chasse au Shahed est OUVERTE ! https://twitter.com/Bruno_Aviation/status/2044743272363376680/photo/1 - bruno aviation tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 转推 @Etienne_Marcuz : 终于！一架法国阵风战斗机被拍到从伊斯特尔空军基地起飞，机翼下挂载着火箭弹吊舱，很可能是为了测试一种用于无人机狩猎任务的低成本解决方案。📸 via @Bruno_Aviation https://twitter.com/Etienne_Marcuz/status/2044760629114802425/photo/1 一架配备激光制导火箭弹的阵风战斗机在伊斯特尔被发现。测试终于开始了。这里是一个泰雷兹JF12吊舱，总共24枚68毫米火箭弹。阵风战斗机的又一项新技能，猎杀“见证者”无人机的行动开始了！ https://twitter.com/Bruno_Aviation/status/2044743272363376680/photo/1 - bruno aviation 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @TankerTrackers : BREAKING; VISUAL CONFIRMATION: IRAN HAS SHIPPED OUT NINE MILLION BARRELS OF CRUDE OIL FROM FLOATING STORAGE IN THE GULF OF OMAN SINCE THE US BLOCKADE WENT INTO EFFECT ON 2026-04-13 AT 14:00 UTC ANOTHER TWO MILLION BARRELS DEPARTED ON 2026-04-12 #OOTT #IranWar #Tankers tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 转推 @TankerTrackers : 突发；视觉确认：自美国封锁于2026年4月13日14:00 UTC生效以来，伊朗已从阿曼湾的浮动储油设施中运出了900万桶原油。另有200万桶于2026年4月12日离港 #OOTT #IranWar #Tankers 推文
